limitation: The dataset represents a specific sample and should not be assumed to represent all populations.
responsible_response: Describe the data source and avoid broad claims beyond the dataset.

limitation: Only available measured variables can be used by the model.
responsible_response: State that unmeasured factors may influence outcomes.

limitation: Linear regression simplifies relationships as additive and linear.
responsible_response: Treat the model as an interpretable approximation.

limitation: Cross-validation estimates internal stability but does not replace external validation.
responsible_response: Validate on new data before deployment in a new setting.

limitation: Predictive associations do not establish causal mechanisms.
responsible_response: Use association language unless causal evidence is available.

limitation: Individual predictions may have meaningful error even when average performance is acceptable.
responsible_response: Communicate prediction uncertainty and avoid exact individual claims.

limitation: The model should support judgment, not replace domain expertise or clinical decision-making.
responsible_response: Use outputs as decision support only within a defined context.
